# Onyx AI Studio
> Practical AI integration, automation workflows, web development, and SEO content systems for business operations.

## Main Pages
- `Home -> https://onyxaistudio.com/`: Overview of Onyx AI Studio, core services, proof points, and contact CTA.
- `Services -> https://onyxaistudio.com/services`: AI integration, automation workflows, web development, and SEO content systems.
- `Case Studies -> https://onyxaistudio.com/case-studies`: Portfolio proof across AI retail inventory search, ambient applications, interactive systems, and SEO architecture.
- `Insights -> https://onyxaistudio.com/insights`: Technical articles about semantic search, automation, and search-ready web systems.
- `Contact -> https://onyxaistudio.com/contact`: Project fit review request page.

## Key Service Pages
- `AI Integration -> https://onyxaistudio.com/services/ai-integration`: Semantic search, assistants, and workflow-aware AI interfaces.
- `Automation Workflows -> https://onyxaistudio.com/services/automation-workflows`: Trigger, routing, notification, and handoff systems.
- `Web Development -> https://onyxaistudio.com/services/web-development`: Next.js sites, dashboards, and product interfaces.
- `SEO Content Systems -> https://onyxaistudio.com/services/seo-content-systems`: Site architecture, metadata, schema, internal linking, and GEO readiness.

## Key Facts
- Onyx AI Studio keeps public copy focused on systems, services, and proof rather than personal background.
- The site is server-rendered with Next.js App Router.
- The site includes JSON-LD, sitemap, robots, and AI crawler guidance.
- Primary topics: AI integration, semantic search, automation workflows, Next.js development, SEO architecture, and GEO.
